market.position: challenger #3 in mid-market; share led by two larger incumbents

competitive.moat: workflow-graph + native CRM bidirectional sync + the new AI sequencing; switching cost is the configured workflows
competitive.moat_strength: moderate — sticky once configured, but feature-replicable by incumbents within ~12-18 months
competitive.primary_loss_reason: 'no SSO/SCIM' and 'single-region' block enterprise — capped at mid-market today

gtm.motion: sales-led with a PLG self-serve entry; ~60% sales-sourced, ~30% marketing-sourced, ~10% partner
gtm.discount_trend: creeping up from 9% a year ago

retention_cohorts.note: Expansion is healthy and carrying NRR, but logo churn at 12% is high for mid-market; the leak is small accounts (<$25k).

icp_fit_with_acquirer.overlap: high — Acme RevOps's mid-market GTM buyer is adjacent to our enterprise GTM buyer; cross-sell path is real
icp_fit_with_acquirer.carry_upmarket_dependency: requires SSO/SCIM + multi-region (the CTO tech-debt items)

source: cro-advisor (NRR/GRR waterfall, pipeline coverage, magic number, discount discipline) + cro-review Q1/Q2/Q3/Q5/Q6 (coverage, win-rate, NRR decomposition, discount creep, source mix)
